name: logan-agent
description: High-performance AI coding agent extension for VS Code featuring modular LLM routing, token scrubbing, and advanced ReAct workflows.

logan.apiKey.description: Global default API key used to authenticate with AI provider endpoints.

logan.baseUrl.description: Global optional Base URL override for custom AI endpoints.

logan.activePlan.description: Select the active pricing and routing plan tier.

logan.models.light.description: Model override for light complexity tasks.

logan.models.medium.description: Model override for medium complexity coding tasks.

logan.models.heavy.description: Model override for heavy reasoning tasks.

logan.tiers.light.description: Independent configuration for light tier tasks (properties: providerType, apiKey, baseUrl, model).

logan.tiers.medium.description: Independent configuration for medium tier tasks (properties: providerType, apiKey, baseUrl, model).

logan.tiers.heavy.description: Independent configuration for heavy reasoning tasks (properties: providerType, apiKey, baseUrl, model).

logan.tiers.embedding.description: Independent configuration for embedding generation tasks (properties: providerType, apiKey, baseUrl, model).

logan.tiers.image.description: Independent configuration for vision/image tasks (properties: providerType, apiKey, baseUrl, model).

logan.tiers.audio.description: Independent configuration for audio/music generation tasks (properties: providerType, apiKey, baseUrl, model).
